articles.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return

articles.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
articles.description: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

articles.title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
articles.description: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.
